message: We need a certificate of origin and FSSAI compliance document for the Tejpata batch before we can raise a purchase order. Our food safety auditor requires this. Can BPSV provide these for the current batch?
What is the curcumin percentage in the current batch from Assam? We need minimum 4.5% for our API extract process. Also, can we get a sample (500g) before placing the full order?
adminNotes: Lab report shows 5.1% curcumin. Sample dispatch arranged via BlueDart. AWB no. BD9823471.

message: We are an export firm and need honey with NMR (Nuclear Magnetic Resonance) authenticity test report for our Singapore buyers. Does BPSV have access to NMR-tested batches? This is non-negotiable for the export consignment.
adminNotes: NMR test arranged via EAS lab Bangalore. Report shared with buyer on 15 Jan. Buyer confirmed they will proceed.

message: We want to discuss a season-advance arrangement. Our restaurants need 500 packs per month consistently. Can BPSV commit to a quarterly supply agreement with fixed pricing? What are the payment terms for advance booking?

Last consignment of Sal Seeds had 8% moisture content instead of the promised 6% max. This impacted our oil extraction yield by ~12%. We need to discuss quality compensation and whether the next batch can include a moisture certificate from a NABL lab.
adminNotes: Issue escalated to procurement team. ₹6,000 credit note issued against next order. NABL test arranged going forward.

message: We are a registered FPC and want to explore if BPSV can white-label the Mahua Flowers under our brand 'Jungle Gold'. We would place minimum 200 bags per month. Do you offer private label packaging services for bulk buyers?
adminNotes: Escalated to BPSV programme head. Private label feasibility being explored. Board approval needed.

message: We are looking for Amla with Vitamin C content > 600mg/100g with a FSSAI test report. What is your current price per tonne for 5-tonne bulk commitment? We represent a nutraceutical company in Pune.
